title: The Golem's Chain
description: The golem has been tested with 2 ingredients. Deduce the reaction pattern and identify the target group.

hints.text:
The golem reacts to SIZE on a specific color channel.
Known tests:
  ing1: chest=✓ ears=✓  →  animators
  ing5: chest=✓ ears=✓  →  animators
Chest reacts to R+S. Ears react to B+S. An animator needs BOTH. Cross-reference with untested ingredients.
The animators are: ingredients [1, 5]. Alch: ing1→nPp, ing5→pNn.
